content.rendered:
We design, program and perform unique light shows for artists, productions, festivals and corporate events worldwide.

Ever since our establishment in 2011, we offer endless ideas and practical solutions to overcome any challenge. With over a decade of experience, our passion for creating unforgettable experiences has led us to work with some of the biggest names in the entertainment industry.

We specialize in creating lighting designs that perfectly complement the artists’ music and enhance the audience’s experience. Our team of experts uses the latest technology to bring each show to life, from the initial concept to the final performance. We believe that every event is an opportunity to create something extraordinary, and we are dedicated to realizing signature shows for our clients.

Talking about us? Feel free to download our logo’s and reference photo’s to use through the links below! In search of more information? We are always happy to talk to you about what we so passionately do! Just contact us through our contact page.

  • Logo
  • Company Video
  • Pictures
  • Contact
